reviews.review_title: Alone in the Dark Wont Work.
reviews.review_description: I shoot the option and nothing happens, but I think the actual game is fine though.

developer_response.body: Sorry about that! We are aware of the issue but Oculus is no longer allowing us to publish updates to the game. A workaround is to relaunch the game a couple times.

reviews.review_description: First off this game feels amazing and ubget a since of freedom, the devs are very responsive and are working to add new features as we speak. All in all this game puts me in the mind of Assasins creed black flag, as i loved being in the open sea and is all aroind a fun game. Bravo devs u have added yet another gem to the short list of oculus games we have!!!

Here's a novelty a nearly open world VR survival game set on a raft (well most of the time). Zoom around the islands collecting the treasures and resources (well  actually shooting them) avoiding the TNT barrels, running over the resource crates and avoiding or shooting the sharks. gather enough resources and you get to summon rescue and win.

Nice to look at and quite fun to play.  should keep you amused for a while and well worth the cost.

If it werent for the fact that my raft decided to go sideways after a collision with a dead shark I would have given it 5 stars but it evidently has a few (non game breaking) bugs.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the review! We are very happy to hear you enjoyed the game!
We are aware of the collision issues with the raft and other objects, we have a 'reset raft' button in the pause screen to help minimize the issue.

Sorry to hear that. We are continuing to improve our game according to user feedback. You can view our development roadmap here, where you can leave suggestions/ideas:  https://www.bentlightindustries.com/adriftandalone-roadmap

reviews.review_description: I️ think this could be a great game if there were upgrades!!!

developer_response.body: Upgrades are now in the game with our latest update! Use the "give feedback" link in-game to tell us what you think!
